title: Osse shalom
html: Itkadal ve it'kadash sheme raba! Be-alma divra ki-reute ve-iamlich malchute Be-itsmach purkane vikarev meshiheh Be-chaiechon u-ve-iemechon u-ve-chaiei de-chol Bet israel, ba-agala u-viz'man kariv, Ve-imre'u: Amen Iehe sheme raba u-mevorach le-olam u-le-almei almaia It'barach ve-ish'tabach ve-it'pa'ar ve-it'romam ve-itna'assé ve-it'adar Ve-it'ale ve-it'alal sheme de-kud'sha brich hu: Amen Le olam Minkoi Bekata Ve-shirata tush'bechata ve-nechemata damiran be-alma Ve-imre'u: Amen Iehe sh'lama raba mi-sh'maia ve-chaim tov alenu ve-al col bet israel, Ve-imre'u: Amen Bm C F Osse shalom, bim romav Bm C F Hu iaasse shalom aleinu Bm C F Veal col israel Bm C F Veimru amen. Bm C Bm C Iaasse shalom, iaasse shalom C Bm F C Shalom aleinu veal col israev.
